name: smo-ai-brain
description: SMO-AI Brain Context Plugin (Phase 2). Converts a locked Phase 1 input folder into a customer's complete business brain at Class A. Everything is project-level (About-Me, Project files, project-instruction) EXCEPT the 3 config files (profile-settings, cowork-instructions, language-preferences) which are the founder's single global cockpit identity, hoisted to the customer master for multi-business customers. Zero-hallucination, traceability-enforced. MENA-optimized bilingual EN/AR. Consumes smo-ai-onboarding Phase 1 output, produces 1-ProjectBrain/ ready for the customer Claude cockpit.
